title: Dynamic Crates
description: An Apple Crates for the Dynamic Integration mod
body:
![Integrated Dynamics & Applecrates compat Header](https://i.imgur.com/mKQv2GM.png)

## Dynamic Crates
## 
 

Not affiliated with Integrated Dynamics

This mod needs both  [Apple Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/apple-crates/) & [Integrated Dynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/integrated-dynamics) to properly work.

Downloading it from the curseforge launcher will do this automatically for you.

_____________________________________________________________________________

 

### General Information

Apple Crates are functional decoration blocks : you can store items or sell them out of a crate. 

Currently, Integrated Dynamics only adds one type of wood, so you get one crate. 

For more info on how to use the interface of an applecrate, please check out the  [Apple Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/apple-crates) project page
